question: What are the details of the project?
answer:
In the continued mission since the launch of first car in December 2019 to build the ecosystem
and provide customers the convenience of charging infrastructure MG Motor India today
announced a new venture âMG Chargeâ. Under this initiative, MG will install 1000 AC fast
chargers at residential localities across India, a first-ever initiative by an OEM in India.

question: How many chargers will be installed in one society?
answer:
Under this initiative, a max of 4 AC Type 2 chargers (7.4kW) can be installed/society, based
on the feasibility of the site done by the MG Partners. If there is a requirement of more than
4 AC chargers, it can be discussed one on one with the respective society.

question: Can we install DC charger in the society?
answer:
Under MG charge initiative, only AC type 2 chargers can be installed in the society. In case
the society wants to install DC chargers, it can be discussed one on one with the respective
society under different investment model.

question: What is the process of partnering in this project?
answer: Interested RWAs can share their contact details on MG website or contact their nearest MG dealership. Dedicated member from nearest MG dealership will contact to discuss the proposal in detail.

question: Is the charger compatible with other EVs in the market?
answer:
Yes. The chargers installed under this project will be Type 2 AC Charger that are compatible
with most of current and future EVs in market. The time duration of charging will vary for
other EVs depending on the battery size and charging capacities.

question: How much time will the charger take to charge MG ZS EV completely?
answer:
We are installing AC Type 2 fast Charger that takes 6-8 hours for charging MG ZS EV from 0
to 100%

question: Is the charger open to anyone visiting the society?
answer:
The chargers will be installed under Captive usage. That means they will be available to use
for all the residents and the visitors of the society authorized by the respective RWAs.

question: How can a resident book charging slot for a particular time?
answer:
Information about the chargers can be accessed using the Charger management system app
provided by MG authorized partner and RWA. Residents and guests can download that app
to discover and access the chargers and pay per use.

question: Who will pay the electricity bill?
answer: Detailed process will be discussed and shared with RWA team during the briefing meeting.

question:
Will the RWA get the reimbursement of electricity consumed by the charging
stations?
answer: Detailed process will be discussed and shared with RWA team during the briefing meeting.

question: How will RWA get the reimbursement of electricity bill?
answer: Detailed process will be discussed and shared with RWA team during the briefing meeting.

question: . How will the customer make the payment for the charging?
answer:
Information about the chargers can be accessed using the Charger management system app
provided by MG authorized partner and RWA. Residents and guests can download that app
to discover and access the chargers and pay per use.

question:
Who will the customer contact in case of any payment issue or technical glitches
on the app?
answer: The customers can contact the customer helpline number available on the app.

question: Will the electricity charges for charging be same as the home electricity charges?
answer:
The per unit charges of charging will vary since it would be set up by the respective RWA
basis the cost incurred.

question: Who will be responsible for the maintenance of the charger?
answer:
The respective RWA is responsible for the charger maintenance and its operations. In case of
any issues with the charger, they can connect with respective charger suppliers. Additionally,
the RWA can take long term Annual Maintenance package to save from the hassles of
maintaining the chargers at their own cost

question: What is the investment required from the RWA side in this project?
answer: Detailed process will be discussed and shared with RWA team during the briefing meeting.

question: How much time does it take to install a charger inside the residential locality?
answer: Target time of installation is 3-4 weeks post site readiness. However the actual time may vary on a case to case basis

question: Whom should I contact in case of any issues with the charger?
answer: The customer helpline numbers for respective partners will be provided to RWA for easy access post installation.

After the initial screening of profiles, candidates will have to undergo rounds of interviews (Online)- Functional and HR. Selected candidates will receive an offer letter from MG Motor. January 1 st week 2021 (tentative) What will be the base location? Â For plant functions like Manufacturing, Quality, Manufacturing Engineering, Purchase, supply chain, Engineering, EHS, maintenance, HR and IT Finance - the location would be Halol which is 40 kms from main city of Baroda. For Sales and Marketing, Aftersales, Dealer Development, Legal, HR and Finance it would be at Gurgaon Â Are there any age criteria? No, there is no such age criteria. You will be entitled to food allowance and conveyance allowance as per base location.Â Will I get travel allowance and food allowance if I travel to different locations due to business requirement? Yes, you will be applicable for both the reimbursements as per the policy limits.Â

question: FOTA
answer: What do you mean by FOTA? FOTA stands for Firmware Over-The-Air. Owners of the MG Hector will be able to receive real time updates like new features, entertainment content and Software Updates to improve user experience from time to time without having to visit the dealership.Â What will be benefits of FOTA Update? One of the biggest advantages of connected car mobility is the ease of updating software, feature enhancements through OTA without visiting a dealership. FOTA updates are robust, reliable and provide easy access to upgrades.Â What will be the duration of download and update? The FOTA download & installation will take approximately 30 mins however as it is happening via internet so it will be depending on network signal strength & downloading Speed. Thanks!Â What will be impact on other applications while doing a download? You can use all application while DOWNLOADING however it will impact the downloading time and experience of other applications due to internet speed. For faster download we recommend not to use other applications. Thanks!Â How will I know that software is updated? Post completion of the update, the system will auto-generate a success message on the screen. While software is getting updated, it is necessary that engine must be on? It is required to keep the engine in start position and possibly in static condition in good network strength are to ensure seamless/uninterrupted update. If vehicle is moving it may have intermediate network strength and update process may get interrupt or may take more time. Why auto download is not possible? Auto-download can impact the experience of other applications which would be in use at that point. Hence, customers are given control to download the updates as per their convenience.Â Â What will be the steps to start the process? Please follow these steps to install the updates: Go to settings -> Upgrade -> Update Will I get the notifications for software update. Individual notifications wonât be shared/available, however company will release periodic SMS notifications and emailers to check the vehicle to stay tuned. The update will be rolled out to the customers in a phased manner, as per plan. What will happen if engine is stopped or update is interrupted? In case the download is interrupted If the engine is stopped while the download is in process, the user will have to resume the same by clicking on the âupdateâ tab under settings. Â In case the download is interrupted because of network issues, the system will resume download on its own. In case installation is interrupted Post the download, the updates cannot be interrupted manually by the user. Even if the Ignition is switched off, the updates will continue to run in the background. In case, the ignition is switched-off, User has to resume the operation for upgradation.Â What will happen if I will enter in a no network zone? In a bad/ no network zone, the download process will pause and will resume automatically once there is proper network. The download progress will not be impacted and will resume from the last point of update. During installation, network strength variation will not impact the installation progress. What happens in case the software installation is stuck and does not auto resume? This is a highly unlikely scenario as the software installation is thoroughly tested before it is released to the customer. However, in case if such a situation arises, Please Reboot the Head unit by long pressing the centre button. Shut down the car completely and step-out the car. Lock & Unlock the car once and then sitting inside the vehicle try once again to resume the operation. The customer should contact/visit the nearest dealer.

question: MGDP 3.0
answer: What is MG Developer Program & Grant? The MG Developer Program & Grant is developed to create an innovation platform of choice, for developers and innovators, that will encourage them to build new applications and experiences never imagined before in a car. The program is brought together by MG Motor in partnership with technology leaders Adobe, SAP, MapMyIndia. Koinearth, Bosch and Jio. It is open to external developers (students, innovators, inventors, start-ups, and other tech companies) as well as internal teams of intrapreneurs at MG Motor and partner companies. The program seeks solutions by verticals to make the entire automotive ecosystem better by developing in-car services. The theme for this year is Car as a Platform (CaaP) . Why Participate in this program? The program offers a unique opportunity for innovators and developers to work directly with MG Motor and its technology partners to bring solution to market quickly. The consortium behind the program shall provideÂ Specialized, high-level mentoring, relevant to practical development of the solution Learning and relevant content for solution and business development Business plan and modelling Provide testing/ lab facility where possible Network with other participants within the program to drive synergy Access to other startup and develop programs of consortium members, opening a large opportunity Recognition with PR opportunity for winning startups Access to a grant amount. (Award of grant would be at the sole discretion of program jury, based on their evaluation, on a case-to-case basis.) What is the methodology of the program? 1.Â Â Â Â  Submit application online on MG Developer Program and Grant website 2.Â Â Â Â  Shortlisted startups would be assigned a mentor to develop their ideas 3.Â Â Â Â  Present the idea on Demo Day (Dates and venue to be announced) to Jury 4.Â Â Â Â  Jury selects winners for grant and recognition 5.Â Â Â Â  Shortlisted companies and winners may also get opportunity to test/ develop their solutions with one of the member companies. This would be decided and enabled by the assigned mentor. How to apply for the program? Submit application with following details Â 1.Â Â Â Â  Company information â name, location, website, social, contact details 2.Â Â Â Â  Founder/ key person information â name and contact 3.Â Â Â Â  Company profile/ deck 4.Â Â Â Â  Category under which application is submitted 5.Â Â Â Â  Proposed solution in brief (100 words within box provided) 6.Â Â Â Â  What they seek from the Program for the solution 7.Â Â Â Â  Details of proposed solution to be submitted as either of ppt, doc, pdf, jpg and mpg Â  Â  Â  Â  Â  a.Â Â Â Â Â  Should include details of solution Â  Â  Â  Â  Â  b.Â Â Â Â  Stage of development Â  Â  Â  Â  Â  c.Â Â Â Â Â  Proposed business model Â  Â  Â  Â  Â  d.Â Â Â Â  Traction, revenue, if any Â  Â  Â  Â  Â  e.Â Â Â Â Â  Proposed cost of project/ development Â  Â  Â  Â  Â  f.Â Â Â Â Â Â  Lead developers of the solutionÂ What are the key dates*? Website and Announcement â December 01, 2021 Entries close by - January 15, 2021 Mentoring - January 16 â February 28 Demo day â March W2 at NCR (Tentative) * The current plan is as above. However, dates may change as per business requirements. What are the key categories in which I can participate*? 1.Â Â Â Â  Utilities 2.Â Â Â Â  Entertainment 3.Â Â Â Â  Travel and Navigation 4.Â Â Â Â  Security and privacy 5.Â Â Â Â  Payments & Rewards 6.Â Â Â Â  Commerce 7.Â Â Â Â  Others * For more details, refer to the MG Developer and Grant website Who can participate in this program? It is open to external developers (students, innovators, inventors, start-ups, and other tech companies) as well as internal teams of intrapreneurs at MG Motor and partner companies. Which other companies are shortlisted under MG Developer Program & Grant last year? Total 8 start-ups have been shortlisted in phase II of MG Developer and Grant Program 1.Â Â Â Â  MIHUP: Mihup is building a Voice AI platform for enterprises such as customer contact centres, Automotive & TV OEMs. The platform enables enterprise developers to create customized voice interfaces with full control over brand identity and privacy. The interaction analytics solution provided by MIHUP gives 100% analysis of a call centreâs customer interactions to derive actionable insights to improve sales, collection, and customer services. It is an enterprise ready platform for both native cloud and edge deployments. 2.Â Â Â Â  REDBOT: RedBot Innovations provides machine vision, computer vision and image processing turnkey solutions with an intent to help manufacturing organizations improve their quality inspection processes. They provide high value addition to manufacturing process like surface defect inspection, presence /absence of parts, total products count and many more. The technology reduces cost of production at all levels, at the same time reducing human errors. Â 3.Â Â Â Â  ELECTREEFI: Electreefi or TechPerspect, is an Information Technology and eMobility solutions company based out of Noida, Delhi NCR. They are experts in implementation of IoT based eMobility Solutions. They have created an IoT based eMobility Technology Platform that has various components and offerings for both businesses and end customers. They have done extensive work in the Electric Vehicle (EV) domain in association with the leading stake holders in the Indian industry. Â 4.Â Â Â Â  KOINEARTH: Koinearth is a startup working at the intersection of blockchains, machine learning and mechanism design. Koinearth create networks, markets, and economies with trusted information and incentives. Their marketN platform allows supply chains to deliver faster, to reduce their operating costs all while having organizations maintain control over data as an asset. Â 5.Â Â Â Â  FABRIK: Designed especially for creatives, Fabrik makes it easy for to create professional websites that showcase the work. They design and build portfolio in a customized way. The platform connects to the services you already use, which means you can add your work easily, and share it to your social networks quickly. Â 6.Â Â Â Â  ORXA: Orxa Energies is a high-performance electric vehicle and energy systems startup. They want to rapidly electrify all transport. Orxa does this through their fully electric performance vehicles and their performance battery packs. Orxa is capital-efficient, works through first principles and builds "design with function" in all their products. Â 7.Â Â Â Â  GREENTECH: Grinntech offers solutions that are on the forefront of innovation for demanding EV customers, from fully integrated battery packs and off-the-shelf products to custom engineered solutions and battery analytics. Grinntech is passionate about playing a role in electrification of mobility since Mobility for the Future needs to be environmentally sustainable, economically affordable, and socially fun. Â 8.Â Â Â Â  AVATAAR: Avataar.Me is a 3D AI company that helps large enterprise customers create immersive and interactive shopping experiences for their end consumers. Avataarâs vision is to bridge the gap between offline-online experiences by replacing the current 2D visuals with life-size and hyper-realistic 3D XR/AR experiences. Avataarâs use of AR technology brings spatial depth to the onscreen buying/browsing experience. Â What is the Grant amount provided? How much MG has invested? Is any background set up of Start-up is necessary for students? No, anyone with an idea can leverage this platform.

question: FOTA
answer: What do you mean by FOTA? FOTA stands for Firmware Over-The-Air. Owners of the MG Hector will be able to receive real time updates like new features, entertainment content and Software Updates to improve user experience from time to time without having to visit the dealership.Â What will be benefits of FOTA Update? One of the biggest advantages of connected car mobility is the ease of updating software, feature enhancements through OTA without visiting a dealership. FOTA updates are robust, reliable and provide easy access to upgrades.Â What will be the duration of download and update? The FOTA download & installation will take approximately 30 mins however as it is happening via internet so it will be depending on network signal strength & downloading Speed. Thanks!Â What will be impact on other applications while doing a download? You can use all application while DOWNLOADING however it will impact the downloading time and experience of other applications due to internet speed. For faster download we recommend not to use other applications. Thanks!Â How will I know that software is updated? Post completion of the update, the system will auto-generate a success message on the screen. While software is getting updated, it is necessary that engine must be on? It is required to keep the engine in start position and possibly in static condition in good network strength are to ensure seamless/uninterrupted update. If vehicle is moving it may have intermediate network strength and update process may get interrupt or may take more time. Why auto download is not possible? Auto-download can impact the experience of other applications which would be in use at that point. Hence, customers are given control to download the updates as per their convenience.Â Â What will be the steps to start the process? Please follow these steps to install the updates: Go to settings -> Upgrade -> Update Will I get the notifications for software update. Individual notifications wonât be shared/available, however company will release periodic SMS notifications and emailers to check the vehicle to stay tuned. The update will be rolled out to the customers in a phased manner, as per plan. What will happen if engine is stopped or update is interrupted? In case the download is interrupted If the engine is stopped while the download is in process, the user will have to resume the same by clicking on the âupdateâ tab under settings. Â In case the download is interrupted because of network issues, the system will resume download on its own. In case installation is interrupted Post the download, the updates cannot be interrupted manually by the user. Even if the Ignition is switched off, the updates will continue to run in the background. In case, the ignition is switched-off, User has to resume the operation for upgradation.Â What will happen if I will enter in a no network zone? In a bad/ no network zone, the download process will pause and will resume automatically once there is proper network. The download progress will not be impacted and will resume from the last point of update. During installation, network strength variation will not impact the installation progress. What happens in case the software installation is stuck and does not auto resume? This is a highly unlikely scenario as the software installation is thoroughly tested before it is released to the customer. However, in case if such a situation arises, Please Reboot the Head unit by long pressing the centre button. Shut down the car completely and step-out the car. Lock & Unlock the car once and then sitting inside the vehicle try once again to resume the operation. The customer should contact/visit the nearest dealer.
